'''shasozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecidologist|cecidologist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-s-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecidologist|cecidologist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shasozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæsezheth|shæsezheth]] || [[word:shæsezhej|shæsezhej]] || [[word:shæsezhesh|shæsezhesh]] || [[word:shæsezhe|shæsezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shasosozhoth|shasosozhoth]] || [[word:shasosozhoj|shasosozhoj]] || [[word:shasosozhosh|shasosozhosh]] || [[word:shasosozho|shasosozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shasozhoth|shasozhoth]] || [[word:shasozhoj|shasozhoj]] || [[word:shasozhosh|shasozhosh]] || [[word:shasozho|shasozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shasofzhoth|shasofzhoth]] || [[word:shasofzhoj|shasofzhoj]] || [[word:shasofzhosh|shasofzhosh]] || [[word:shasofzhof|shasofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shasozhotho|shasozhotho]] || [[word:shasozhojo|shasozhojo]] || [[word:shasozhosho|shasozhosho]] || [[word:shasozhoko|shasozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shasozhoth|shasozhoth]] || [[word:shasozhoj|shasozhoj]] || [[word:shasozhosh|shasozhosh]] || [[word:shasozho|shasozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shasozhothol|shasozhothol]] || [[word:shasozhojol|shasozhojol]] || [[word:shasozhoshol|shasozhoshol]] || [[word:shasozhokol|shasozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shasozhothotho|shasozhothotho]] || [[word:shasozhojojo|shasozhojojo]] || [[word:shasozhoshosho|shasozhoshosho]] || [[word:shasozhoko|shasozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shasozhothon|shasozhothon]] || [[word:shasozhojon|shasozhojon]] || [[word:shasozhoshon|shasozhoshon]] || [[word:shasozhokon|shasozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shasozhothoro|shasozhothoro]] || [[word:shasozhojoro|shasozhojoro]] || [[word:shasozhoshoro|shasozhoshoro]] || [[word:shasozhokoro|shasozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
